name: hidden canyon
hints: A hidden canyon with a TeePee! The horse brought you here.
GO TEEP to enter the teepee and find treasures inside.
The teepee contains the Sacred Tom Tom and Turquoise Necklace treasures.
GO TEEP enters the teepee (room 37). SAY GIDD on the horse to return.
notes: Hidden canyon reached by riding 'Ole Paint (SAY GIDD). TeePee (room 37) contains two treasures.
